channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: The UN Chief’s Plan to Ease the Organization’s Cash Crunch
item.description: The United Nations’ financial crisis is progressively worsening as a possible doomsday — when the organization can no longer keep its lights on — inches closer with every unpaid or delayed dues payment from all 193 members. In the last two years, the 80-year-old institution has been dealing with an unprecedented liquidity crunch that has ... Read more

item.title: Refugee turned peacemaker: The young woman leader transforming communities in the Central African Republic
item.description: In the heart of the Central African Republic (CAR), a nation long marked by conflict, Nina Mireille Yankinon stands as a symbol of resilience, leadership, and hope, dedicating her life to helping communities torn apart by war.
